cookies.title: Cookies and privacy
cookies.description: We use cookies to ensure the proper functioning of the site, measure its audience and improve your experience. Some cookies are required, while others need your consent. You can accept, refuse or customise your choices at any time.

modal.title: Respecting your privacy
modal.description:
When you browse our site, we may use cookies and similar technologies to ensure its proper functioning, improve your experience, measure audience and — with your consent — personalise our content or communications.

You can accept, refuse or customise the use of non-essential cookies at any time. Some cookies are required for the site to work and cannot be disabled.

necessary.title: Strictly necessary technologies
necessary.description: Required for the site to function (navigation, security, language preferences). They cannot be disabled.

analytics.title: Audience measurement technologies
analytics.description: Let us measure site traffic and identify the most visited pages, so we can continuously improve your experience.

marketing.title: Marketing and advertising technologies
marketing.description: Used to deliver personalised content and advertising — on our site and on other platforms.

functional.title: Functional and personalisation technologies
functional.description: Allow us to remember your preferences and personalise some content to provide a tailored experience.
